channel.title: GitHub Cuda Monthly Trending
channel.description: Monthly Trending of Cuda in GitHub

item.title: NVlabs/instant-ngp
item.description: Instant neural graphics primitives: lightning fast NeRF and more

item.title: DefTruth/CUDA-Learn-Note
item.description: 🎉CUDA 笔记 / 大模型手撕CUDA / C++笔记，更新随缘: flash_attn、sgemm、sgemv、warp reduce、block reduce、dot product、elementwise、softmax、layernorm、rmsnorm、hist etc.

item.title: rapidsai/raft
item.description: RAFT contains fundamental widely-used algorithms and primitives for machine learning and information retrieval. The algorithms are CUDA-accelerated and form building blocks for more easily writing high performance applications.

item.title: NVIDIA/cub
item.description: [ARCHIVED] Cooperative primitives for CUDA C++. See https://github.com/NVIDIA/cccl

item.title: BBuf/how-to-optim-algorithm-in-cuda
item.description: how to optimize some algorithm in cuda.

item.title: brucefan1983/CUDA-Programming
item.description: Sample codes for my CUDA programming book

item.title: mit-han-lab/torchsparse
item.description: TorchSparse: Efficient Training and Inference Framework for Sparse Convolution on GPUs.

item.title: NVIDIA/AMGX
item.description: Distributed multigrid linear solver library on GPU

item.title: Dao-AILab/causal-conv1d
item.description: Causal depthwise conv1d in CUDA, with a PyTorch interface
